<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kusakano Shrine | native_name = 国坂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kusakano Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.490037|133.826542}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kusakano Shrine'''|国坂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hōki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} ** Series ordinal: 2223 * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182772</ref> * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182772</ref> ** Series ordinal: 2231 * {{ill|Unranked|lt=Unranked|ja|无位|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182772</ref> * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182772</ref> * {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182772</ref>
